rules.content: Python project using SQLite + sqlite-vec for vector search. Uses pytest for testing.
MCP server with 8 tools: brain_search, brain_store, brain_recall, brain_entity, brain_update, brain_digest, brain_expand, brain_get_person.
Entity resolution uses cascading pipeline: normalize → exact match → vector similarity → LLM fallback. Thresholds: 0.92 auto-match, 0.75 fuzzy, <0.75 create new.
brain_search defaults to compact format (150-char snippets). Use detail='full' for verbose output.
Never hardcode secrets. Use environment variables.
Flag surprises — if something in the codebase is unexpected, mention it in the review.
